title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Queen, Komurasaki as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Further- more... If one lays a single hand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were witnesses this time!! You won't be able to talk your way out of this one!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad that he did what he did, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: there's no way he can get out of it this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never forget you, LuffyTaro!! And I guess Grandpa Hyogorou will finally meet his end, too...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What an admirable final action, straw hat- man!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HOFF... HOFF.... why are you talking like this is the end!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All ability- users have been cuffed with sea- stone handcuffs just weak enough for them to move around in, as per the prison regulations!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they should only be able to make the most basic of move-ments...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then are you suggesting... that I'm even weaker than that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No! That isn't what I meant...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the Seastone must be working as intended!! He just has extraordinary willpower....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a troublesome guy... we can't have someone who doesn't abide by the basic laws of nature here in this prison!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm training right now!! So that when these cuffs are removed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'll be stronger, even if it's only by a little bit...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you want to get strong- er...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you won't even live to see TOMOR- ROW!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PAO PAA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA PA!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to the pleasure district after we're done here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She's wasting her time with Oroch!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When should we tell him... that Komurasaki is dead?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?! Why didn't you say so sooner?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I lost weight. I'd be too popular!! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So that's why I stay big!! �

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I may seem round, but it's all muscle!!;)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's Time to Sing and Dance!! =

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DAMMIT... IF ONLY I COULD USE HAKI RIGHT NOW...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry to keep you all waiting, you bunch of trashy scum!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 68 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
